message:
feat(beads): Create comprehensive UX audit bead structure

Creates 6 epics and 18 detailed tasks for improving RCH user experience:

EPICS:
- bd-w50b: TUI Visual Polish and Accessibility (P1)
- bd-184c: CLI Consistency and Usability (P1)
- bd-1nk5: Error Handling and User Messaging (P1)
- bd-mvpd: Progress Indicators and User Feedback (P2)
- bd-28xs: Configuration Experience and Validation (P2)
- bd-1f0i: Code Architecture and Maintainability (P3)

KEY TASKS:
- Replace emoji icons with unicode for terminal compatibility
- Add --verbose flag consistently across all commands
- Add confirmation prompts to destructive operations
- Replace bail!() calls with structured error types
- Add progress indicators to long-running commands
- Add config doctor command for health validation
- Split commands.rs into modular files

Each bead includes:
- Detailed problem description
- Solution design
- Files to modify
- Testing requirements
- Dependencies on other beads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
